ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered on the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewing_history" (
  "viewing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie watched */,
  "viewing_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was watched */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the movie was watched */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used for watching the movie */,
  "watched_with" TEXT /* Names or user IDs of other users who watched the movie together */,
  "duration_watched" INTEGER /* Duration in minutes that the user watched the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie rated */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given to the movie (e.g., * 1/2, **, ***) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Written review of the movie */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., mobile app, web, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genre_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genre_mapping_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genre_mapping_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES movie_genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "cast_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the cast member in the movie */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast member associated with the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_mapping_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_mapping_cast_id FOREIGN KEY ("cast_id") REFERENCES movie_cast ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended movie */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason why the movie was recommended */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., algorithm, user recommendation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new movie, recommendation, promotion) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the preference */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre preferred by the user */,
  "preference_weight" REAL /* Weight of the user's preference for the genre */,
  "watched_with_preference" TEXT /* Preference for watching movies with specific users */,
  "device_preference" TEXT /* Preferred device for watching movies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES movie_genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
